pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 19 and 39 contain AGENT_URL and DISRUPTIVE_URL with this exact URL
setup_task.sh line 39 sets userInfo.displayName=%22DisruptiveUser%22; verified in verifier.py line 72
setup_task.sh line 19 sets userInfo.displayName=%22Moderator%22; verified in verifier.py line 72

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task that simulates a Jitsi Meet moderation scenario. The meeting is hosted locally at http://localhost:8080/GovernanceMeeting. Two participants are configured: an agent called 'Moderator' and a disruptive participant named 'DisruptiveUser'. The task requires the agent to remove the disruptive participant using the Jitsi UI while remaining in the meeting.
